event: Sol Union discovers a massive underground reserve of rare minerals in the vicinity of Helios Directorate, sparking tensions and a sudden surge in militarization.
The Helios Directorate launches a daring raid on an unguarded Solar Array owned by the Sol Union, crippling their energy production and further straining relations.
The Sol Union launches a massive propaganda campaign, painting itself as a beacon of peace and prosperity in a desperate attempt to shift public opinion towards its favor.
